intro:
There is no information available about Pulassarium laurinum. However, based on the name and available information, it seems that Pulassarium laurinum is actually Laurustinus (Viburnum lantana), a flowering plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa.

Laurustinus is a shrub with medicinal properties, providing several health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting against bacterial infections, and possessing antioxidant properties. Its bioactive constituents include viburnine, viburnic acid, and other phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Laurustinus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues.
